title: Full Website Redesign for Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio

requirements.summary: Apply unified artisanal visual theme with warm color palette and bold typography across all sections
acceptanceCriteria: A unified visual theme is applied consistently across all page sections
Color palette uses warm, earthy, artisanal tones (no generic blue/grey corporate look)
Typography is bold and expressive with clear hierarchy between headings and body text
No section feels visually disconnected or inconsistent with the rest

file_operations.description: Update global CSS custom properties to reflect the new artisanal theme: replace existing color tokens with a warm, earthy palette (deep terracotta, warm cream, charcoal, rust, ochre tones). Add custom font declarations if needed. Ensure all color variables use OKLCH color space for consistency. Add utility classes for the new design system (shadows, spacing, decorative accents).

Update Tailwind configuration to extend the theme with new artisanal color tokens (terracotta primary, warm cream backgrounds, charcoal text, rust accents). Configure custom font stacks with bold weights. Add custom spacing scales, border radius values, and box-shadow utilities aligned with the artisanal aesthetic. Ensure all components can consume these tokens consistently.
Update root-level CSS custom properties to align with the new artisanal design system. Replace existing OKLCH color tokens with warm earthy tones. Ensure consistency with frontend/src/index.css.

requirements.summary: Redesign Navigation component with refined layout, improved logo presentation, and high-contrast CTA button
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation is visually polished and matches the new design theme
Mobile menu is clean and functional
WhatsApp 'Hire Me' CTA button is prominent and styled consistently
Double-tap logo easter egg still navigates to admin login

file_operations.description: Redesign the Navigation component with refined visual styling: update the header background, logo sizing and positioning, nav link typography and hover effects, mobile menu button and panel styling. Apply high-contrast styling to the 'Hire Me' WhatsApp CTA button using the new terracotta accent color. Ensure scroll-aware backdrop blur and shadow effects match the new theme. Preserve all existing functionality: scroll-aware styling logic, double-tap logo easter egg navigation to admin login, WhatsApp pre-filled message link, mobile menu toggle. Do not modify any functional logic or data fetching.

requirements.summary: Redesign HeroSection with full-screen immersive layout, dramatic typography, and refined CTA buttons
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is visually striking and full-screen
Artist name and tagline are displayed with large, dramatic typography
CTA buttons (WhatsApp and Gallery) are styled consistently with the new theme
Background cover image with overlay is well-composed

file_operations.description: Redesign the HeroSection with a full-screen, immersive layout: apply large, dramatic typography for the artist name and tagline using the new bold font stack. Refine the background overlay gradient to match the warm color palette. Update CTA button styling (WhatsApp and Gallery links) with high-contrast colors, refined borders, shadows, and hover effects consistent with the artisanal theme. Ensure the cover image (fetched via useGetCoverImage) is displayed prominently with the overlay. Preserve all existing dynamic content fetching logic and WhatsApp pre-filled message link. Do not modify backend data fetching.

requirements.summary: Redesign AboutSection with improved two-column layout, portrait presentation, and decorative accents
acceptanceCriteria: About section layout is clean and well-proportioned
Portrait image is prominently displayed with tasteful decorative treatment
Stats row (years active, projects done, client satisfaction) is clearly presented
Section matches the overall new visual theme

file_operations.description: Redesign the AboutSection with an improved two-column layout: refine the artist portrait image presentation with decorative border treatment and shadow effects matching the artisanal theme. Update the floating experience badge styling with warm accent colors and refined typography. Enhance the stats row (years active, projects done, client satisfaction) with improved card styling, icon treatment, and spacing. Update decorative corner accents to align with the new design system. Apply consistent typography hierarchy for the heading and bio text using the new font stack. Preserve all existing static content (bio text, stats values, portrait image reference). Do not modify any data structures or backend fetching logic.

requirements.summary: Redesign ServicesSection with improved card layouts for seven service offerings
acceptanceCriteria: Service cards are visually polished with consistent spacing and hover effects
All seven services are displayed correctly
Card style matches the new overall design theme

file_operations.description: Redesign the ServicesSection with improved card layouts: apply refined card styling with warm borders, subtle shadows, and hover effects consistent with the artisanal theme. Update the CheckCircle icon color to use the new terracotta accent. Refine typography for service titles and descriptions using the new font stack. Ensure consistent card spacing and responsive grid layout. Apply improved section heading typography. Preserve all existing service data (seven services with titles and descriptions). Do not modify the service data array or any logic.

requirements.summary: Redesign FeaturedProjects and ProjectSection with impactful layout and refined numbered badges
acceptanceCriteria: Featured projects section has a striking, editorial-style layout
Numbered badges are stylistically on-brand
Image and text areas are well-balanced
All five projects render correctly

file_operations.description: Redesign the FeaturedProjects wrapper component: update section heading typography and spacing to match the new artisanal theme. Ensure consistent styling is applied to all five project entries rendered via ProjectSection. Preserve the existing PROJECTS array data and mapping logic. Do not modify project data or rendering logic.

Redesign the ProjectSection component with a more visually impactful layout: refine the 70/30 image-to-text split presentation with improved spacing and visual hierarchy. Update the numbered overlay badge styling with warm accent colors, refined borders, and bold typography matching the artisanal theme. Apply improved text panel styling (location, title, description) with the new font stack and color palette. Ensure alternating layout direction logic is preserved for odd/even projects. Add refined hover effects and transitions. Preserve all existing props (title, description, image, location, project number) and layout direction logic. Do not modify any functional behavior.

requirements.summary: Redesign ArtworkGallery with improved grid layout, refined hover effects, and polished lightbox
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery grid is visually clean and responsive
Hover effects on artwork cards are elegant and on-brand
Lightbox dialog is well-styled and functional
Backend data fetching is preserved

file_operations.description: Redesign the ArtworkGallery component: update the responsive grid layout with improved card styling (borders, shadows, hover scale effects) consistent with the artisanal theme. Refine the lightbox dialog styling with warm colors, improved close button, and refined image presentation. Apply improved section heading typography. Ensure elegant hover effects on artwork cards with smooth transitions. Preserve all existing backend data fetching via useGetAllArtworks and Uint8Array-to-object-URL conversion logic. Do not modify any data fetching or image conversion logic.

requirements.summary: Redesign WhyChooseSection with improved card styling for six trust-point cards
acceptanceCriteria: Trust cards are visually refined and consistent with the new theme
Numbered accents are styled on-brand
All six trust points are displayed correctly

file_operations.description: Redesign the WhyChooseSection component: update card layouts with refined styling (warm borders, subtle shadows, improved spacing) matching the artisanal theme. Apply numbered accent styling with terracotta colors, bold typography, and decorative treatment. Refine section heading typography and card title/description text using the new font stack. Ensure all six trust-point cards are visually consistent. Preserve all existing static content (trust point titles and descriptions). Do not modify any data or logic.

requirements.summary: Redesign ContactSection with improved card layouts for Location, WhatsApp, and Instagram
acceptanceCriteria: Contact cards are visually polished and clearly legible
Icons and labels are styled on-brand
Dynamic contact data from backend is still used with proper fallbacks

file_operations.description: Redesign the ContactSection component: update the three contact cards (Location, WhatsApp, Instagram) with refined styling (warm borders, subtle shadows, improved spacing and icon treatment) consistent with the artisanal theme. Apply improved typography for card labels and contact details using the new font stack. Refine icon colors to use terracotta accents. Ensure section heading typography matches the new theme. Preserve all existing dynamic contact detail fetching via useMediaContacts hook and hardcoded fallback defaults. Do not modify any data fetching logic or fallback values.

requirements.summary: Redesign Footer with refined layout covering brand info, nav links, and contact details
acceptanceCriteria: Footer is well-structured and visually consistent with the new theme
Brand info, nav links, and contact details are clearly organized
Double-tap logo easter egg to admin login is preserved

file_operations.description: Redesign the Footer component with a refined layout: update footer background color, border styling, and spacing to match the artisanal theme. Refine typography for brand info, navigation links, and contact details using the new font stack and warm color palette. Apply improved visual hierarchy with clear section separation. Enhance link hover effects with terracotta accents. Preserve all existing functionality: double-tap logo easter egg navigation to admin login, WhatsApp and Instagram external links, navigation links. Do not modify any functional logic.

requirements.summary: Update QRSection styling to match the new artisanal theme

file_operations.description: Update the QRSection component styling to match the new artisanal theme: refine section background, border, shadow, and spacing. Update typography for the section heading and follow CTA using the new font stack and warm color palette. Ensure the QR code display area is well-styled with decorative treatment consistent with the theme. Preserve all existing functionality: Google Charts QR code generation, Instagram profile link fetching via useMediaContacts, loading skeletons. Do not modify any data fetching or QR generation logic.
